findings.title: What is API Monetization? - Models, Examples, Benefits (2026)
findings.description: SaaS APIs extend product functionality and open new revenue streams by offering value-added access to external users. Tiered subscription or usage-based pricing. Freemium access to attract developers and upsell premium features. Monetize integrations and automation that save time or add value.
